name: Bentons's Sauce - a Variation on the Traditio
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the fresh grated horseradish, mustard (English), and caster sugar.
2. Gradually add the malt vinegar to the mixture in the bowl.
3. Stir well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Serve using Ron's Plaice from Blackpool:)
